description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upper Two main compartments with one zipped pocket in one and an organiser sleeve in the other compartmentTwo short handles with a buckle designZipped pocket on the backTwo zipped pockets on the front with asymmetric openings for enhanced spaceStitch detailing and a buckle design on the sides for styleMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 44 cmDepth: 14 cm
